versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   raw-2-0-2                       true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: raw
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: raw-2-0-2
      name: raw
      namespace: raw
      values: |
        raw:
          resources:
          - apiVersion: v1
            kind: Pod
            metadata:
              name: alpine-sleep
            spec:
              containers:
                - name: alpine
                  image: alpine:3.19
                  command: ["sleep", "3600"]
